title: 8. General & Specific Regulatory Requirements
text_content: For the complete list of applicable standards, related deliverables and organizations responsible see D47457 HAL 4.0 Applicable Standards  [Reference 1]. HAL shall comply with the listed standards and regulations and evidence in the form of test reports or checklists as defined in the Applicable Product Standards document must be provided. text_content: Localization requirements derive from the Labeling Language Requirements. Regulatory Affairs determines and monitors language requirements for product labeling, based on country-specific requirements outlined by the regulatory authorities of the respective countries. Business needs may determine additional language requirements. Localize? YES - UA will be translated. Localization strategy deviates from Labeling Language Strategy. See details that follow. All three documents will be translated to Simplified Chinese. The English versions of those documents will be designated for China only and hidden from non-China audiences on MyVarian. The Localization team advises on its schedule and the time required after English source publication to create and publish the corresponding translations. During planning and as needed during authoring, the UAD works with the Localization team to schedule the English UA and translation publication aligned with project requirements. .
